content.full_text:
CONNY B. McCORMACK
REGISTRAR OF VOTERS

INGRID E. GONZALES
ASSISTANT REGISTRAR

County of San Diego
REGISTRAR OF VOTERS
5201 RUFFIN ROAD, SUITE I, SAN DIEGO, CALIFORNIA 92123-1693

OFFICE:
TDD:
FAX:
Location Code:
Mail Stop:

(619) 565-5800
(619) 694-3400
(619) 694-3441
(619) 694-2955
550
034

October 17, 1991

Attn: Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

A written response is requested delineating the reasons the redistricting announcement postcard, to affected registered voters, does NOT meet the mass mailing criteria of the Government Code. Attorney Mark Morodomi of your Legal Division has offered a tentative opinion on the specific name content. A copy of the postcard draft, which is intended to inform voters of their Board of Supervisors district and representative change, is attached.

We are in the process of typesetting and printing, with a mailing target date of mid-November. Your earliest response is appreciated.

Sincerely,

CONNY B. McCORMACK
Registrar of Voters

Linda P. Bunch
Campaign Disclosure Filing Officer

CBM:lpb

Attachment

COUNTY
SEAL                    N O T I C E                    TOP
                                                        HAT

Due to the required realignment of County Board of
Supervisor boundaries following the 1990 census, you are
no longer in Supervisorial District ___ and represented
by Supervisor ___________________. Effective
November 1, 1991, your residence address is now included
in Supervisorial district ___ and is represented by
Supervisor _____________________.

Once Federal and State redistricting plans are
implemented, you might also have a change of
representation in Congressional, State Senate, and State
Assembly Districts. If these changes affect your
residence, they will appear in your sample ballot.

If you have questions about your representatives or
districts call the Registrar of Voters at 694-3201.


'Dear Occupant at:


Return
Address


Do Not FORWARDED


[Box outline]
BULK RATE


OCCUPANT
